thesis: MORNING window ~10:48am ET Monday 7/20 (generated 2026-07-20T14:48:24Z, marketClosed=false) — a LIVE Monday session is now printing, so this updates the 7:18am pre-market plan with what actually changed at the open. STRUCTURE FIRST off the most-recent CONFIRMED completed daily bar (Friday's 7/17 close) plus today's live intraday tape; persistence by distinct COMPLETED daily bars is unchanged at 7 (7/09->7/10->7/13->7/14->7/15->7/16->7/17; 7/17 confirmed, today's live Monday bar has NOT settled and is not counted). WHAT CHANGED: the open HELD the SPY 50-day and the whole complex bounced modestly off Friday's soft close — SPY 745.01 now +0.20% over its rising 50-day (~743.5) and -1.66% off the ATH (~757.6), up from Friday's on-the-line +0.01%/-1.89%; SPMO 145.79 / VGT 113.66 firmed off their soft Friday marks. WHAT DID NOT: the two structural features are intact — (1) QQQ 699.95 is still TANGLED and -2.60% BELOW its 50-day (~718.6); the reclaim is closer but STILL UNWON (mom5 -1.66); (2) MSFT 395.05 is still bear-stacked and -1.47% below its 50-day (~401.0, mom5 +1.04) — contesting the reclaim from below, closer than Friday's -1.87% but not through it. The DEFENSIVE/ENERGY rotation is CONFIRMED and STRENGTHENED on this run's fresh RRG (sector read 2026-07-20T14:48:24Z): XLE Leading (rsRatio 100.4>100, accel +2.52 board-best, rsMom 103.0 board-best, +13.31% >200d, rotation into) with real assets broadening underneath (fresh real-assets read 13:30Z: BNO 67.2 Uptrend the board leader, DBC broad-commodity 65.7 Uptrend, DBA agriculture 65.3 Uptrend, USO 61.1 Uptrend), XLRE/XLP still Leading, while XLF has now rolled from Peaking to Weakening↓ (accel -1.40, out) and XLV (accel -2.21, out) / XLI (accel -1.42, out) weaken; stretched semis (SOXX) are basing but still heavy short-term (rsMom1m -12.35, only 2/12 above the 50-day, 1/12 up-momentum). VIX 18.22 is LOW but FIRM (fresh, eased further from the 7:18am 18.32 and Friday's 18.77) — under the 3-point single-reference regime-change threshold but the multi-session firming persists. TACTICAL, last: Friday's monthly OPEX is RESOLVED — dealer gamma has RESET for the new monthly cycle, so any prior pin/wall/magnet values are DEAD; Monday's fresh post-OPEX gamma walls, VIX9D/VIX3M term structure and the live 7/29 FedWatch path are NOT in this run and MUST be re-pulled before sizing anything off positioning, vol term structure or the Fed. Plan for the rest of today into the next session: HOLD the bull-stack (the open held, but do NOT add index beta while QQQ is still tangled below its 50-day and vol is firm); ROTATE toward the now-stronger, oil-confirmed XLE over weakening XLV; TRIM stretched, still-heavy semis INTO this Monday relief bounce; HOLD (don't chase) MSFT as it contests its 50-day from below into the 7/29 capex guide; carry a small defined-risk hedge toward the underpriced 7/29 hike tail after re-verifying the live path.
